subcodes.title: Words to an Indian scholar, spoken on 1914-03-25
subcodes.first_line: They appear and disappear. They have no importance whatsoever in the religious world... The course of this stupendous creation is not changed through their blind, dogmatic assertions.
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @Manifestation of God as educator, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @need for an educator
